MELItem.Title: Landing Gear Door Close Position Indication Sensors

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One on each landing gear may be inoperative deactivated.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative gear door close position indication sensor (AMM DDG 32-61-02).

ListItem.Para: Make sure that the landing gear doors are closed.

Identify the inoperative position indication sensor on the LNDG GEAR INDN AND STRNG maintenance page. The inoperative DR CLOSED SENSOR (L, R or NOSE) will show FAR in the status field or have a blank status field.
Open and deactivate the landing gear doors.
Gain access to the inoperative indication sensor.
Disconnect, cap and stow the electrical connector for the inoperative sensor.
On the LNDG GEAR INDN AND STRNG maintenance page, confirm the remaining DR CLOSED SENSOR for the associated gear (L, R or NOSE) shows FAR in the status field.
On the LNDG GEAR INDN AND STRNG maintenance page, confirm the remaining DR CLOSED SENSOR for the associated gear (L, R or NOSE) shows NEAR in the status field.
